stories.title: Follow live: Portugal, Croatia clash in round of 3...
Sources: 76ers, with Brown on board, eye LeBron
stories.summary: One day after trading for Jaylen Brown, the 76ers have entered the mix for LeBron James and are attempting to pitch him, sources said.

stories.title: MLB hands Cavalli, Contreras 7-game suspensions
stories.summary: Cade Cavalli and Willson Contreras each have been suspended seven games for their roles in a benches-clearing brawl at Fenway Park on Tuesday night. Miles Mikolas received a five-game suspension, and Red Sox outfielder Nate Eaton got a three-game ban.

stories.title: After Spain win, Yamal says 'World Cup starts now'...
stories.summary: Lamine Yamal said "the World Cup starts now" after shining in Spain's 3-0 win over Austria at SoFi Stadium, with the Barcelona star being named the game's MVP.

stories.title: Brown 'excited and disappointed' for 76ers trade
stories.summary: Former Celtics star Jaylen Brown says he is "excited and disappointed" over his trade to the 76ers.
